title: brachypodium × ambrosii
intro: Brachypodium × ambrosii, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between two different species of Brachypodium, is a perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The plant is also rich in antioxidants, which can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, providing various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Brachypodium × ambrosii can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional medicine formulations to treat various ailments.
